error_signature: only returns raw JSON call instead of executing tool
title: AI Agent not executing tools, only returning JSON
symptom: The AI Agent outputs the raw JSON call instead of executing the tool, resulting in no processed output. For example, it shows the input as a JSON string instead of the calculated result.
not_this_if: Different model that supports tool execution
root_cause: The GPT-OSS model requires specific parameters to enable tool execution. Without these parameters, the model defaults to returning the function call payload as JSON instead of executing the tool.
fix_steps: Access the configuration for the GPT-OSS model
agent_instruction: Add the required parameters to the GPT-OSS model configuration to enable tool execution.
